history.content:
Hello, I'm Dr. Mira. I'm genuinely glad you're here today. This is a completely safe and confidential space — you can share whatever is on your mind, at your own pace, without any judgment at all.

To start us off — how have you been feeling lately?

It's nice to meet you too. I can tell you're feeling a bit reserved, and that's completely okay. Sometimes it's hard to put into words how we're feeling.

Can you tell me a little bit about what brings you here today? What's been going on that's made you want to speak with me?
